## What does this PR do?

- [ ] New community app  ·  [ ] Update community app  ·  [ ] Official (Velaris team only)

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry added to the correct `sources.json` (`community/` or `official/`)
- [ ] `download_url` points at the hosted/committed `.hxapp`
- [ ] `checksum_sha256` is the sha256 of that exact `.hxapp`
- [ ] `outbound_domains` lists every host the app contacts (no internal IP ranges)
- [ ] Read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
